title: segmentation fault : cmd hierarchy
code_blocks:
yosys -import

set WAY  2
set WIRE 32

set NAME "Dlatch"

read_verilog $NAME.v
chparam -set "WAY" $WAY $NAME
chparam -set "WIRE" $WIRE $NAME

#segfault inside
hierarchy -check -top $NAME
check

write_verilog out.v
write_spice out.sp
write_rtlil out.rtlil

$ gdb yosys
(gdb) run -c crashtest.tcl 

Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
0x00005555556d6a1a in Yosys::RTLIL::Design::module(Yosys::RTLIL::IdString const&) ()
